dreams.title: cyberpunk battle
dreams.description: "I was flying over a cyberpunk city while giant dragons chased me."

blueprint.objective: Disable the central core and download the data files.

stories.intro: You wake up in a surreal dreamscape. You are the legendary Cyborg Explorer, standing at the threshold of a mysterious landscape. The air is thick with tension as echoes of Sentry Drone growls reverberate in the distance.
stories.mission: Your quest is clear: Disable the central core and download the data files. Beware, for AI Overlord Prime is guarding the core exit and will do everything in its power to stop you.
stories.ending: With a final surge of power, AI Overlord Prime crumbles to dust. The dreamscape begins to shatter into particles of pure light. You open your eyes, returning to the waking world, carrying the high score of a champion.

dreams.title: Labyrinth of Echoes
dreams.description: Explore a shifting maze woven from fragments of your past dreams, where choices reshape the paths and emotions alter the world around you.

blueprint.objective: Collect all gold coins and reach the sacred temple gate.

stories.intro: You wake up in a surreal dreamscape. You are the legendary Jungle Explorer, standing at the threshold of a mysterious landscape. The air is thick with tension as echoes of Bouncing Slime growls reverberate in the distance.
stories.mission: Your quest is clear: Collect all gold coins and reach the sacred temple gate. Beware, for Giga Gorilla King is guarding the core exit and will do everything in its power to stop you.
stories.ending: With a final surge of power, Giga Gorilla King crumbles to dust. The dreamscape begins to shatter into particles of pure light. You open your eyes, returning to the waking world, carrying the high score of a champion.

dreams.title: Fused: cyberpunk battl + Labyrinth of Ec

blueprint.boss: AI Overlord Prime-Giga Gorilla King Chimera
blueprint.objective: Disable the central core and download the data files.

stories.intro: An anomaly in the dreaming dimension has collapsed two realities. You stand as the fused Cyborg Explorer / Jungle Explorer Hybrid.
stories.mission: Survive the combined forces of Sentry Drone and Bouncing Slime and defeat the fused boss!
stories.ending: With a final surge of power, AI Overlord Prime crumbles to dust. The dreamscape begins to shatter into particles of pure light. You open your eyes, returning to the waking world, carrying the high score of a champion.
